emails.subject: Re: 3/13 Checkout Con't
emails.body: Re: 3/13 Checkout Con't This deal was done on the Intercontinental Exchange (ICE). Jeff thought it was the same thing as Dynegy Direct. I've changed it to ICE as broker, but I'm wondering if these are different brokers, or why Jeff would have thought they were the same....??? Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 03/13/2001 02:31 PM

emails.subject: Re: 3/13 Checkout Con't
emails.body: Then I guess we can safely say that Jeff is in la-la land. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 03/13/2001 02:52 PM
